title: The Agent Loop
description: One user request, one model loop, one tool surface.

steps.content: List the files in this workspace and tell me what looks important.
steps.annotation: The loop starts with a natural language request.
The model chooses its only action surface.
The harness appends the result back into the conversation.

steps.content: This repo is centered around teaching agent mechanics. The `agents/`, `web/`, and `tests/` directories are likely the key entry points.
steps.annotation: With one loop and one tool, the agent can already inspect and answer.
